---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for agent-ready
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the problem from the user's seat — a vibe-coder connecting a
backend, a developer editing a manifest, or someone building on the
toolkit. What can't they do today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Be as concrete as you can — an example manifest
snippet, a CLI command, a wizard screen sketch, whatever fits.

## Does this touch the capability manifest spec?

- [ ] Yes — this changes or adds to the manifest shape (`packages/core`).
      Please also open an `RFC:` issue per
      [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#rfc-process-for-manifest-spec-changes)
      instead of / alongside this one.
- [ ] No — this is additive tooling, docs, an adapter, a surface, or a
      deploy target that doesn't change the manifest's shape.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why you're proposing this one.

## Anything else

Links, prior art, related issues.
